title: Overfiend
notes: Collection/anthology row present; individual contents not explicitly recoverable from TLBranson list.

curation.synopsis: A monstrous Ork warlord known only as the Overfiend has seized the Octarius system, and three Space Marine Chapters answer the threat. The White Scars send a Stormseer to bend the storm against the greenskins; the Raven Guard strike from the shadows; and the Salamanders bring fire and forge-craft to bear. Fighting alongside the Astra Militarum and the unpredictable Eldar, the three brotherhoods wage a converging campaign across the worlds of Octarius, hunting the Overfiend through ruin and battle. Collected here are three linked tales of very different sons of the Emperor united against a single, savage foe.

flags.reason: single-author collection of three novellas; individual protagonist names not reliably surfaced by search
